prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第26名                         ，近年排名稳定在24–27名区间，属于全国顶尖综合性大学；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（前卫校区浴池事件）和学术不端舆情，13起                         事件均为负面，可能轻微影响部分考生报考意愿；抖音热度排名第40（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，整体关注度尚可。2022–2023年曾出现投档断档记录，2025年江苏物理类                         法学暴跌2700名、黑龙江临床组下降约1000分，显示部分专业存在波动风险；第五轮学科评估A+学科2个（考古学、马克思主义理论），A学科5个（化学、数学                         、机械工程、法学、物理学、兽医学），A-学科8个（哲学、工商管理、政治学、材料科学与工程、生物学、电子科学与技术、计算机科学与技术），共15个A-及以上学科，学科                         实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业社会热度高热推荐；临床医学、口腔医学持续偏                         热；法学分化观望。本省物理类考生2021年21.6万→2025年36.3万，持续增长；2026年全省普通高考总人数60.98万，按近年物理类占比约60%估算约36.6万人，较2025年略有增加                         ，竞争加剧。省控线物理类本科批2021年412→2025年459，呈上升趋势，反映整体竞争水平提高；吉林大学位于吉林省长春市，属东北地区，对本省考生而言属                         于跨省就读；该校在河北省招生规模较大（物理类约367–405人），属省外重点生源省份，无明显地域偏好偏移。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动（2025年基准16339名）、20                        26年物理类计划小幅缩招（-2.4%）、本省考生总数持续增长、声誉舆情偏负面等因素：缩招对位次有轻微下拉作用（位次数字减小），但考生增加和声誉影响有上推作用（位次                         数字增大），两者大致抵消。预测2026年物理类最低位次约16104名，区间15604–16604名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 minimum rankings for Physics Category: approximately 16515 → 14004 → 22825 → 14866 → 16339, with significant fluctuations in recent 5 years; an abnormal high of 22825 in 2023 was followed by a rebound to 14866 in 2024, and a backward shift to 16339 in 2025; cumulative backward shift of about 1473 places in the last 2 years, with a 2025 baseline of approximately 16339; provincial Physics Category enrollment plans: 405 in 2021, 406 in 2022, 397 in 2023, 391 in 2024, 376 in 2025, showing a gradual annual decrease; 2026 plan of 367, a further reduction of 9 (about -2.4%) compared to 2025, slightly alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 26th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 24–27 range in recent years, a top-tier comprehensive university nationwide; 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (Qianwei Campus Bathhouse Incident) and academic misconduct rumors, with all 13 incidents being negative, potentially slightly affecting some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity rank 40 (relatively hot), short video exposure moderately high, overall attention acceptable. There were records of enrollment gaps in 2022–2023; in 2025, Law in Jiangsu Physics Category plummeted by 2700 places, and Clinical Medicine in Heilongjiang dropped by about 1000 points, indicating volatility risk in some majors; Fifth round discipline evaluation: 2 A+ disciplines (Archaeology, Marxist Theory), 5 A disciplines (Chemistry, Mathematics, Mechanical Engineering, Law, Physics, Veterinary Medicine), 8 A- disciplines (Philosophy, Business Administration, Political Science, Materials Science and Engineering, Biology, Electronic Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology), totaling 15 A- and above disciplines, strong disciplinary strength, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation and other engineering majors are socially hot and highly recommended; Clinical Medicine and Stomatology remain consistently hot; Law is divergent and wait-and-see. Provincial Physics Category candidates: 216,000 in 2021 → 363,000 in 2025, continuous growth; 2026 total provincial Gaokao candidates 609,800, estimated Physics Category proportion about 60% ≈ 366,000, slightly increased from 2025, intensifying competition. Provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch: 412 in 2021 → 459 in 2025, upward trend, reflecting overall increased competition; Jilin University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, Northeast China, considered cross-province study for Hebei candidates; the university has a large enrollment scale in Hebei Province (Physics Category about 367–405), a key out-of-province source province, with no obvious regional preference deviation.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering historical ranking fluctuations (2025 baseline 16339), 2026 Physics Category slight enrollment reduction (-2.4%), continuous growth in provincial candidate numbers, and negative reputation sentiment: the enrollment reduction has a slight downward effect on ranking (ranking number decreases), while candidate increase and reputation impact have an upward effect (ranking number increases), roughly offsetting each other. Predicted 2026 Physics Category minimum ranking approximately 16104, range 15604–16604.

Jilin University has a wide range of disciplines and numerous A-level subjects; it is recommended to prioritize majors corresponding to its advantageous disciplines.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2097 → 2028 → 2627 → 1919 → 2181. Over the past 5 years, it fluctuated within the 1900–2600 range. In 2023, it peaked at 2627, then rebounded to 1919 in 2024, and slightly shifted back to 2181 in 2025. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 2181. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 31 in 2021, 33 in 2022, 40 in 2023, 50 in 2024, and 54 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. In 2026, the plan is 59, an increase of 5 (about +9.3%) compared to 2025. Expansion intensifies competition (ranking number increases).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 26th, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the top comprehensive universities nationwide. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents and academic misconduct rumors, which may slightly affect some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranks 40th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure. There were records of enrollment gaps in 2022–2023, but no obvious gap signals for History Category. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 2 A+ disciplines (Archaeology, Marxist Theory), 5 A disciplines (Law, Chemistry, Mathematics, Mechanical Engineering, Physics, Veterinary Medicine), and 8 A- disciplines. Among them, Law (A), Marxist Theory (A+), Archaeology (A+), and Philosophy (A-) are highly relevant to History Category enrollment majors, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.
6. [Major Popularity and Environment] Law social popularity is divided and wait-and-see but remains a hot liberal arts major; Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese majors are recommended; Journalism and Communication are clearly discouraged. The number of History Category candidates in this province was 202,000 in 2021 → 244,000 in 2025, showing continuous growth. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the national college entrance examination in the province is 609,800. Estimated at about 40% for History Category, it is about 245,000, slightly higher than in 2025. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch rose from 454 in 2021 to 477 in 2025, showing an upward trend.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Jilin University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, in the Northeast region. For candidates in this province, it is an out-of-province school. The History Category enrollment scale expanded from 31 to 59, making it a key source province outside the province, with no obvious regional preference shift.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations (baseline 2181 in 2025), the significant expansion of History Category enrollment in 2026 (+9.3%), and the continuous increase in the number of candidates in the province: expansion pushes the ranking upward (ranking number increases), and the increase in candidates further intensifies competition. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 2302, with a range of 1802–2802.
